steps.name: Add Sweep/Checklist toggle to HomeView
steps.criteria: HomeView shows a toggle (Sweep | Checklist) at the top; default is Sweep; tapping Checklist switches to checklist mode; tapping Sweep switches back; toggle state is local UI state
steps.scenario_name: home view has sweep checklist toggle

steps.name: Checklist mode shows StapleChecklist with QuickAdd
steps.criteria: In Checklist mode: QuickAdd bar at top, StapleChecklist below, no area sections, no sweep progress; the allAreasComplete gate on StapleChecklist is removed; Sweep mode shows existing area-based view unchanged
steps.scenario_name: checklist mode shows alphabetic list and quick add
